response.justification: Exceptional fit with 15+ years of full-stack development significantly exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Currently working on AI agent infrastructure at staff level, directly addressing a key required skill. Deep expertise across required technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes). Primary concern is lack of explicit Nest.js, Jest/Vitest/Playwright mention, though extensive TypeScript/Node.js background suggests these are quickly acquirable.
strengths: Current Staff role actively developing AI agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks—directly matches required AI agent development skill
15+ years full-stack experience with proven expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS CDK, and Docker/Kubernetes
Built and maintained complex systems at scale (millions of HTTP requests/second at Dunnhumby, millions of annual mail sends at Optilyz)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js experience despite it being the primary backend framework
No explicit mention of testing framework expertise (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) or authentication/security best practices
Significant background in alternative technologies (D, Ember.js) suggests broader versatility but not focused primary-stack depth
